name: Cleghorn Minerals Ltd.
summary: Cleghorn Minerals Ltd. engages in the exploration, evaluation, and promotion of its mineral properties and other projects. It explores for iron, titanium, vanadium, gold, silver, copper, zinc, and other minerals or elements. The company holds a 100% interest in the Meech Lake - Matachewan Prospect that consists of 183 cells covering an area of 3,892.3 hectares located in the Argyle, McNeil, and Robertson Townships in Northeastern Ontario. Cleghorn Minerals Ltd. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Val-d'Or, Canada.
